projects.title: Projects
projects.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this project?
projects.subtitle: Projects group related chats with shared context and instructions.
projects.createProjectDescription: Create a project to organize your chats by topic, like "Spanish Learning" or "Code Review".
projects.noModelMessage: Please download a model first from the Models tab.
projects.deleteProjectConfirm: Delete "{name}"? This will not delete the chats associated with this project.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.noDocumentsSubtext: Add files to build your knowledge base
knowledge.filePickerUnavailableMessage: The file picker isn't responding. Please close and reopen the app, then try again.

modelSettings.title: Model Settings
modelSettings.resetConfirm: This will restore all model settings to defaults.
modelSettings.resetMessage: This will reset all model settings to their defaults.
modelSettings.textGenHelp: Configure how the model generates text responses.
modelSettings.temperatureDesc: Controls randomness. Lower values are more deterministic, higher values more creative.
modelSettings.maxTokensDesc: Maximum number of tokens the model can generate in a single response.
modelSettings.contextLengthDesc: Number of tokens the model considers as context. Higher values use more memory.
modelSettings.highContextWarning: High context length may cause out-of-memory errors on devices with limited RAM.
modelSettings.showGenDetailsDesc: Display timing and token information during generation.
modelSettings.backendCpuDesc: Uses CPU only. Compatible with all devices.
modelSettings.backendMetalDesc: Uses Apple Metal GPU acceleration. Recommended for Apple Silicon.
modelSettings.backendOpenclDesc: Uses OpenCL GPU acceleration. Best for Qualcomm devices.
modelSettings.backendHtpDesc: Uses Qualcomm Hexagon NPU. Available on Snapdragon devices.
modelSettings.flashAttentionDesc: Optimizes attention computation for faster generation on supported hardware.
modelSettings.quantizedCacheWarning: Quantized cache reduces memory usage but may slightly affect quality.
modelSettings.strategyPerformance: Prioritize performance — may use more memory
modelSettings.topPDesc: Nucleus sampling threshold. Lower values make output more focused.
modelSettings.repeatPenaltyDesc: Penalizes repeated tokens. Higher values reduce repetition.
modelSettings.cpuThreadsDesc: Number of CPU threads for computation. Higher values may speed up generation.
modelSettings.batchSizeDesc: Number of tokens processed in parallel. Higher values use more memory.
modelSettings.enhanceOnDesc: Prompts are automatically enhanced for better results.
modelSettings.enhanceOffDesc: Prompts are used as-is without enhancement.
modelSettings.openclGpuAccelDesc: Uses GPU to accelerate image generation. May increase memory usage.
modelSettings.detectionPatternDesc: Uses pattern matching to detect NSFW content. Fast but less accurate.
modelSettings.detectionLlmDesc: Uses the LLM to detect NSFW content. More accurate but slower.
modelSettings.guidanceScaleDesc: How closely the image follows the prompt. Higher = more faithful, lower = more creative.
modelSettings.imageThreadsDesc: Number of threads used for image generation.
modelSettings.imageGenHelp: Configure settings for AI image generation.
modelSettings.autoDetectionDesc: Automatically select the best detection method for your model.
modelSettings.manualDetectionDesc: Manually select which detection method to use.
modelSettings.autoModeNote: The system will choose the most effective detection method based on your active model.
modelSettings.manualModeNote: Choose the detection method that works best with your current setup.
modelSettings.imageStepsDesc: Number of denoising steps. More steps = higher quality but slower.
modelSettings.imageSizeDesc: Resolution of generated images. Larger sizes use more memory.
modelSettings.systemPromptHelp: Set a default system prompt that will be included in all new conversations.

voiceSettings.title: Voice Settings
voiceSettings.privacyText: Voice transcription happens entirely on your device. Your voice data never leaves this device.

feedback.title: Send Feedback
feedback.description: Report a bug or share a suggestion

about.description: Off Grid brings AI to your device without compromising your privacy. This fork from the original 0.0.89 and add https://hf-mirror.com

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: All your data stays on this device. No conversations, prompts, or personal information is ever sent to any server.

remoteServers.title: Remote Servers
remoteServers.emptyDescription: Connect to Ollama, LM Studio, or other LLM servers on your network

security.title: Security
security.infoText: When enabled, the app will lock automatically when you switch away or close it. Your passphrase is stored securely on device and never transmitted.
security.passphraseHint: Passphrase must be at least 6 characters
security.dataProtectedLocally: Your data is protected and stored locally
security.lockedOut5min: You have been locked out for 5 minutes due to too many failed attempts.
security.tipMix: Use a mix of words and numbers
security.tipMemorable: Make it memorable but not obvious
security.descriptionNew: Create a passphrase to lock the app. You will need to enter it each time you open the app.
security.descriptionChange: Enter your current passphrase and then set a new one.
security.passphraseTooLong: Passphrase must be 50 characters or less
security.errorOccurred: An error occurred. Please try again.

download.title: Download Manager
download.browseModelsHint: Go to the Models tab to browse and download models
download.subtitle: Connect to a model server on your network, or download one to run directly on your device.
download.limitedCompatibilityText: Your device has limited memory. You can still browse and download smaller models from the model browser.
download.noServersFoundText: No servers found. Make sure you're on the same WiFi network as your Ollama or LM Studio server, then scan or add it manually.
download.noServersFoundMsg: Make sure you're on the same WiFi network as your server and that it's running.
download.scanFailedMsg: Could not scan your network. Make sure you are connected to WiFi.
download.connectedNoModelsMsg: {{name}} is reachable but has no models loaded. Start a model in Ollama/LM Studio, then reconnect.
download.connectedMsg_one: {{name}} is ready with {{count}} model. You can start chatting now.
download.connectedMsg_other: {{name}} is ready with {{count}} models. You can start chatting now.
download.initErrorMsg: Failed to initialize. Please try again.
download.deleteModelMsg: Are you sure you want to delete {{fileName}}? This will free up {{size}}.
download.deleteImageModelMsg: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This will free up {{size}}.
download.removeDownloadMsg: Are you sure you want to cancel this download?
download.downloadFailedMsg: The connection dropped while downloading. Please try again.
download.retryDownloadMsg: This will restart the download from the beginning. Continue?
download.visionRepairedMsg: Vision file restored for {{fileName}}. Reload the model to enable vision.
download.couldNotFindProjFile: Could not find vision projection file for this model
download.couldNotRetryDownload: Could not retry download - metadata not found

sectionSubtitle.quantizationLevel: Choose a quantization level. Q4_K_M is recommended for mobile.

textModelsTab.emptyText: No compatible files found for this model.

imageModelsTab.hfErrorText: Failed to load models from Hugging Face

gallery.title: Image Gallery
gallery.generatePrompt: Generate an image by typing a description in the chat.

project.name: Name
project.systemPromptHint: This prompt sets the behavior and context for all chats in this project.
project.systemPromptPlaceholder: Enter system prompt for this project...
project.systemPromptTip: Tip: A well-written system prompt helps the AI understand the context and purpose of your project.

voiceInputUnavailable.title: Voice Input Unavailable
voiceInputUnavailable.message: Download a Whisper model to enable on-device voice input.

documentPreview.title: Document
documentPreview.fileNotFound: File not found. The document may have been stored in a previous app installation. Please re-upload the document.
documentPreview.noTextContent: Could not extract text from this document

deviceInfo.title: Device Information
deviceInfo.description: Your device tier determines which models will run smoothly. Higher RAM allows larger, more capable models.
